Speech by President Lorie Logan

Outlook for the economy and monetary policy

Lorie Logan

February 10, 2026

Dallas Fed President Lorie Logan delivered these remarks in Austin, Texas.

Good afternoon, everyone, and I appreciate the opportunity to talk with you about the U.S. economy and monetary policy.

U.S. economy and monetary policy

After lowering rates at each of its last three meetings of 2025, the FOMC decided to hold the fed funds target range steady in January.

With inflation still elevated, those cuts took on additional risk on the inflation side of our mandate.
